title: Code search API client for cross-artifact search queries
purpose: Provides a client interface to search code across pseudo files and linked snippets using a unified API endpoint.
module_context: Exports an interface for code search results and a function to fetch those results via HTTP POST.

methods.name: fetchCodeSearch
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, query: string, limit?: number): Promise<CodeSearchResponse>

steps.content: Construct URL parameters including project and session identifiers.
Send a POST request to the code search API endpoint with query and limit.
IF the response indicates failure, parse the error message and throw an exception.
ELSE parse and return the JSON response containing the search results.
